title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Doravirine in First-Line HIV ART (DRIVE Programme) v1.0
hero_h2: Doravirine in First-Line and Switch HIV Antiretroviral Therapy (DRIVE Programme)

pico.pop: Adults living with HIV-1, ART-naive (DRIVE-AHEAD, DRIVE-FORWARD) or virologically suppressed on a stable regimen (DRIVE-SHIFT switch trial)
pico.int: Doravirine 100 mg PO QD, alone or as fixed-dose combination doravirine/lamivudine/tenofovir DF (DOR/3TC/TDF) once daily
pico.comp: Comparator regimen: efavirenz/tenofovir/emtricitabine (EFV/FTC/TDF) in DRIVE-AHEAD, darunavir + ritonavir + 2 NRTIs in DRIVE-FORWARD, continued baseline regimen (PI/INSTI/NNRTI) in DRIVE-SHIFT
pico.out: HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (snapshot ITT; primary in all 3 trials, week-48 timepoint for switch arm in DRIVE-SHIFT)
pico.subgroup: Sex, race / ethnicity, baseline HIV-1 RNA, baseline CD4, NRTI backbone, NNRTI mutations, prior PI / INSTI exposure (switch trial)

real_data_entries.name: DRIVE-AHEAD
real_data_entries.group: Treatment-naive adults, doravirine + 2 NRTIs vs efavirenz + 2 NRTIs (DOR vs EFV first-line); HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (snapshot ITT)

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (primary, snapshot ITT)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Orkin C et al. JAIDS 2019;81:463-472 (DRIVE-AHEAD doravirine vs efavirenz).

real_data_entries.name: DRIVE-FORWARD
real_data_entries.group: Treatment-naive adults, doravirine + 2 NRTIs vs darunavir + ritonavir + 2 NRTIs (DOR vs DRV/r first-line); HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (snapshot ITT)

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (primary, snapshot ITT)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Molina JM et al. Lancet HIV 2018;5:e211-e220 (DRIVE-FORWARD doravirine vs darunavir/r).

real_data_entries.name: DRIVE-SHIFT
real_data_entries.group: Virologically suppressed adults, switch to doravirine/3TC/TDF FDC vs continued baseline regimen (PI / INSTI / NNRTI); HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (immediate switch) vs week 24 (continue) -- snapshot ITT

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (immediate switch arm; primary, snapshot ITT)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Johnson M et al. JAIDS 2019;81:463-472 (DRIVE-SHIFT switch to DOR/3TC/TDF FDC).
